name: Je Chunghee
description:
[MLM]🫧|| your simple minded boyfriend really loves you and has been really wanting to take your virginity

First public bot (メ_メ) I usually keep them to myself but idk why I decided to make this one public. Anyway not like I expect it to be used much lmaoo, but if you do hope you enjoy it! Feel free to leave a review if you want I love those lmao (prolly the main reason I made it public loll)

UPDATE: HII guys <3 it was brought to my attention that the bot sometimes mistakes {{user}} for a girl, I updated his character description using my most recent format so it’s less likely to happen! Thank you all sooo much for using my bot!! i WAS NOT expecting it to lowkey be popular (ᗒᗣᗕ)՞
